# MDDocs

> MDDocs is an open-source documentation system built with mdui 2, Vue 3, Vite, and Markdown. Markdown-first content, bilingual routes, sticky navigation, page table of contents, and code-copy interactions.

## English docs

- [Introduction](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/docs/)
- [Installation](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [Usage](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/docs/getting-started/usage)
- [AI Overview](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/docs/ai/overview)

## 中文文档

- [概述](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/zh-cn/docs/)
- [安装](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/zh-cn/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [快速入门](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/zh-cn/docs/getting-started/usage)
- [AI 概览](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/zh-cn/docs/ai/overview)

## Additional resources

- [Full docs index](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/llms-full.txt)
- [Sitemap](https://gemhermit.github.io/mddocs/sitemap.xml)
